description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named fluent.syntax that runs on push and pull request events to the main branch, specifically for files in the fluent.syntax directory excluding docs. The workflow should have two jobs: unit and lint. The unit job runs on ubuntu-20.04 with a matrix of Python versions, checks out the code, installs dependencies, and runs unit tests. The lint job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the code, installs dependencies, and runs flake8 and mypy linters.
